creator: marcus@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

6.0-STABLE is no longer supported.  At minimum, you must be running 6.4-STABLE 
(i.e. RELENG_6 recently cvsup'd and built).  If it still fails, then open 
a new PR after rebuilding libpam with -DOPENPAM_DEBUG, and reproducing the 
problem.
